mapper.select:
SELECT board_no, title, writer_id, hit, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date,'%Y-%m-%d') AS reg_date, ref, re_lev, re_seq FROM board
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND writer_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR writer_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY ref DESC, re_seq ASC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND writer_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') OR writer_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%'))
SELECT board_no, title, content, writer_id, writer_pw, hit, ref, re_lev, re_seq, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS reg_date FROM board WHERE board_no = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (title, content, writer_id, writer_pw, ref, re_lev, re_seq, hit, reg_date) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writerId}, #{writerPw}, #{ref}, #{reLev}, #{reSeq}, 0, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET ref = #{boardNo} WHERE board_no = #{boardNo}
UPDATE board SET hit = hit + 1 WHERE board_no = #{boardNo}
UPDATE board SET title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE board_no = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_file (board_no, file_name, file_path, file_size) VALUES (#{boardNo}, #{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize})
